turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Hi, I have an appointment already booked and I need to move it to a different day.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: May be recorded for quality and training purposes.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: That's fine. I just need to reschedule my appointment. Can you help me with that?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Maria?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Um, no, this is Jenny. I just need to reschedule my appointment for later this week.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Thanks for letting me know, Jenny, are you calling to reschedule for yourself?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Yes, that's right. I have a work conflict and need to move my appointment to later in the week, if possible.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: please provide the full name and date of birth of a patient whose appointment, you'd like to reschedule

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Sure! My full name is Jenny Park, and my date of birth is 04/15/1994.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Just to confirm, I have your name as Jenny Park and your date of birth as April 15th 1994.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Yes, that's correct! Now, can you help me find a new date for my appointment?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: so could you please could you please spell your first and last name for me

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Of course! It's J-E-N-N-Y P-A-R-K.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Go ahead and spell your first and last name, please.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Sure! It’s J-E-N-N-Y and P-A-R-K.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Please spell your first, and last name for me,

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Okay! It’s J-E-N-N-Y and P-A-R-K.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Whenever you're ready, please spell your first and last name.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Alright! It's J-E-N-N-Y and P-A-R-K.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Please spell out your first and last name.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Sure! It's J-E-N-N-Y and P-A-R-K.

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Please go ahead and spell your first and last name.

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Alright, it's J-E-N-N-Y and P-A-R-K. Can we move on to rescheduling my appointment now?

turns.speaker: human_agent
turns.text: Thanks, could you please finish spelling your first name and then spell your last name as well?

turns.speaker: patient_bot
turns.text: Sure! My first name is J-E-N-N-Y, and my last name is P-A-R-K. Can we get to rescheduling my appointment?
